title: Schoolnet India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Schoolnet India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Schoolnet India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
